cards.afterText: If you won the combat, return this card to your hand.
cards.title: Who's hungry?

cards.basicText: This card's effects cannot be canceled.
cards.duringText: If your opponent played a versatile card, this card's value is 1 instead.
cards.title: Better the devil you know

cards.immediateText: The opposing fighter's special abilities are inactive until the start of your turn.
cards.title: It's only cannibalism if we're equals

cards.afterText: Your opponent discards a number of cards from their hand equal to the damage dealt to the defending fighter.
cards.title: Observe or Participate?

cards.basicText: This card's effects cannot be canceled.
cards.duringText: If the opposing fighter played FEINT, gain 1 attack action.
cards.title: Should've hopped faster

cards.afterText:
Choose 2 different effects with a value equal to the BOOST value of the opposing fighter's card:
►   ​​opposing fighter takes X damage
►   Hannibal recovers X health
►   ​​draw X card(s)
cards.title: Sophisticated Palate

cards.immediateText:
If Hannibal is in two zones, this card's value is 4. 
If he is in three zones, this card's value is 6 instead.
cards.title: Bowels in or bowels out?

cards.afterText: If you won the combat, deal damage to the opposing fighter equal to the printed value of your opponent’s card.
cards.title: Inside your head

cards.afterText: Remove Hannibal from the board. At the start of your turn, place Hannibal in any space.
cards.title: Wendigo

cards.duringText: If the damage dealt by the opposing fighter would reduce Hannibal's health to less than 1, suffer no damage instead.
cards.title: You can always find me

cards.basicText:
Your opponent discards a card. 
If Hannibal is adjacent to 2 or more opposing fighters, an adjacent sidekick is defeated.
cards.title: Eat the rude

cards.basicText:
Discard 1 random card from your opponent's hand.  
Hannibal recovers 2 health.
cards.title: Betrayed by good taste

cards.basicText: Deal 2 damage to an opposing fighter in your zone and draw up to 2 cards.
cards.title: Old friend for dinner

cards.basicText: If this is your first action, deal 3 damage to an adjacent fighter. Your opponent gains 1 action on their turn.
cards.title: That may have been impulsive

hero.name: Hannibal
hero.specialAbility:
PSYCHIATRIST
At the start of your turn, look at 2 random cards in your opponent’s hand.

ruleCards.content:
IT'S ONLY CANNIBALISM IF WE'RE EQUALS

The effect of this card only applies to the special abilities printed on the opposing fighter's character card.
ruleCards.title: Card Clarification

sidekick.quote:
"   Killing must feel good to God, too...   " 
     He does it all the time.

                                  -Dr. Hannibal Lecter

name: Hannibal Lecter
note: NBC's Hannibal played by Mads Mikkelsen
